_comment: Hand-curated ProcessingMethod -> enhances/diminishes -> FlavorAttribute relationships. Methods are keyed by the coarse `category` cqi_loader assigns (wet / dry / honey / semi-washed). Flavor names match nodes in the WCR/SCAA flavor wheel (flav_attributes.name).

relationships.note: Washed: clean cup that showcases origin acidity, floral and citric high notes, tea-like clarity; fermentation character is rinsed away.
Natural / dry: fruit dries on the cherry, pushing heavy berry and jammy dried-fruit sweetness plus winey/boozy depth, at the cost of clean citric brightness.
Pulped natural / honey: mucilage left on the bean yields rounded syrupy sweetness — brown sugar, vanilla, soft fruit — between washed clarity and natural intensity.
Semi-washed / wet-hulled (giling basah): earthy, herbal, cocoa and cedar/spice with full body and muted acidity, the classic Sumatran profile.
